meaning: adj.无(大)门的 无闸门的
examples: I don't know where this thing happen, but it should be at rural and ungated areas. Local citizens are not well educated, and so they are ignorant.
The characteristics of an ungated overflow spillway are investigated. Some important design aspect and hydraulic computation methods for the spillway entrance zone are discussed.
An ungated version of the paper Yglesias refers to is here.
For instance, in 2005, the Orlando Sentinel looked at sheriff's reports over a four-year period on 1.400 Florida homes in both gated and ungated communities that were similar in price and location.
